title: Enderman Muted
description: Every Enderman sound in the game is now muted. Completely silent.
body:
I created this Resource-Pack because the enderman sounds were annoying me.
I had an Enderman (XP) Farm and you could say the sounds were driving me nuts, plus I didn't want to mute ALL other hostile sounds.

And then I thought.. maybe there's more people like me?
So here we are.. I'm releasing it to the public for everyone to use, enjoy!

![https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fbca32c-d963-4b25-b54b-baf6a21b10a7.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fbca32c-d963-4b25-b54b-baf6a21b10a7.webp)
Link: http://bisect.thenexusproject.net/
